name: crew
description: Marketplace for the crew plugin and its cross-model verifier dependency.

plugins.name: crew
plugins.description: The new way to build — an iterative dev loop as four skills: flow (the loop), auditor (correctness), editor (written-content), and specialist (the cross-model gate). The crew builds and reviews every commit as it lands; chunks and turns close at a Codex + /code-review gate.

plugins.name: skill-codex
plugins.description: Delegate prompts to OpenAI Codex CLI — crew's cross-model verifier. Sha-pinned; upstream: skills-directory/skill-codex.
